description: Swedish Somali organized crime syndicate originating from Rinkeby, Stockholm, founded in 2015. Engaged in illegal drug trade, murders, and other criminal activities. Operates in Sweden, Finland, Denmark, Morocco, and Spain. Known for a long-running gang war with rival group Shottaz since 2015.

country_links.evidence_quote: Two men were murdered in Herlev , by two 17 year old Dödspatrullen members in June 2019.
country_links.context: Dödspatrullen members committed murders in Herlev, Denmark, and attempted to flee the country.

country_links.evidence_quote: The criminal organization is said to have entered into the Finnish market, transporting drugs from Övertorneå to mainland Finland.
country_links.context: Dödspatrullen entered the Finnish market, transporting drugs from Övertorneå to mainland Finland and selling them to gangs in major Finnish cities.

country_links.evidence_quote: Dödspatrullen smuggles drugs, such as cocaine , hashish and other drugs, from Spain and Morocco into the Nordic region.
country_links.context: Dödspatrullen smuggles drugs from Morocco into the Nordic region.

country_links.evidence_quote: Dödspatrullen smuggles drugs, such as cocaine , hashish and other drugs, from Spain and Morocco into the Nordic region.
country_links.context: Dödspatrullen smuggles drugs from Spain into the Nordic region.
